checks_run: conservation: traced every money-moving path (transfer/vaultWithdraw/vaultDeposit/adminGive/adminTake/adminSet/adminReset, tax collectTax/applySourceIncomeTax, salary payout, fine issue/revoke, gov transfer/payout, pay/pay-account) — all route through LedgerServiceImpl.transferInternal double-entry postings; no path UPDATEs a balance (balances written solely by trg_postings_ai trigger); same-account transfer rejected

double-spend: verified source overdraft gate reads flags under LOCK IN SHARE MODE (lockAccountFlagsForShare) and limited-source balance under FOR UPDATE (lockBalances, ascending account_id) with OverdraftPolicy floor; unlimited SYSTEM/-1 sources skip the lock deliberately; adminSet read-modify-write holds FOR UPDATE across the whole txn; login clock serialised by striped monitors + FOR UPDATE

precision: confirmed all internal money is BigDecimal/DECIMAL; Money.requirePositive rejects >2-decimal amounts before any posting insert; computeTax/tax proration setScale(2, HALF_EVEN); double appears only on the Vault Economy interface boundary (required by Vault) and pagination ceil — not currency

failure atomicity: @Transactional boundaries on all service ops; Vault deposit is deliberately at-least-once and reports TRUTHFULLY (never FAILURE after commit) so retries don't double-credit; source income tax runs post-commit and cannot flip a committed deposit to FAILURE; ChestShop market recording is fail-soft analytics separate from money movement

idempotency: dedup keys via Idempotency.sha256 + uq_ledger_dedup on ledger_txns; concurrent identical-dedup insert re-resolves via findByDedupKeyLocking; starting-balance/salary/tax/fine/gov-transfer keys include distinguishing fields to avoid false-collapsing distinct transfers

identity: all account keying by UUID (BINARY(16)) not name; offline/uncached/Bedrock targets resolved via PlayerDirectory; read paths (balanceOther) use read-only lookup so phantom-UUID name lookups can't mint a faucet account; account_redirects route legacy gov 'player' UUIDs
confusing-behaviour: checked error messages, partial-apply, ambiguous player-vs-gov-name resolution (refused, not silently mis-routed), same-account guards
not_applicable: api-website-consistency: verifying that the Next.js explorer and treasury-rest-api display the same numbers the plugin persists requires reading economy-explorer/ and treasury-rest-api/, both outside this cell's scope (treasury/src/main, treasury/treasury-api/src/main). getEconomySummary()/getEconomyTotalsByType() intentionally mirror the explorer's total-supply scope (exclude SYSTEM + archived, include PERSONAL/BUSINESS/GOVERNMENT) per its own doc comment, but cross-JVM equivalence with TransferService and the DAL cannot be confirmed from within treasury alone.

inventory-dupe-vectors: shop-GUI / trade-menu / shift-click / drag inventory dupe vectors live in the chestshop component, not treasury; treasury only records the resulting sale (MarketApiImpl) and moves money via the audited transfer path.

checks_run: Conservation: traced every money entry point (deposit/withdraw/pay into|player|business/send/disband-drain/balance-tax) — all money movement goes through treasury.transfer or TaxApi.collectBatch; no application-side balance UPDATEs; no currency created/destroyed outside Treasury mint/burn.

No double-spend: transfers rely on Treasury's authoritative ledger + per-account overdraft floor; Business hasFunds() checks are advisory pre-checks only, correct pattern for a ledger-authoritative system. Member/authorizer reconciliation serialized per-firm via ReentrantLock (firmSyncLocks). Account-name creation serialized under the same lock.

Precision: grep for double/float across scope — only non-currency uses (pagination ceil, chat radius). All money is BigDecimal; tax split uses BigDecimal with HALF_UP and drift folded into largest account so per-account sum == total tax exactly.

Failure atomicity: createFirm compensates orphaned Treasury account on rollback; disbandInternal drains per-account with each account left linked on failure (idempotent re-run); completeTransferProprietorship/adminSetProprietor wrap proprietor change + account reassignment transactionally.
Dupe vectors: no inventory/GUI/click-event money handling in this component (ChestShop sale is consumed as a Treasury event, buffered in-memory for notifications only — no money moved here).

Idempotency: balance-tax uses Idempotency.sha256 dedup key per (firm,account,periodStart); ExpireRequestsJob is a plain expiry sweep. Sales-notification flush drops buffered notifications on shutdown (notifications only, not money).
Identity: all keying is UUID/BINARY(16); offline/never-joined/name-change handled — FirmPlayer lookups fall back to raw UUID, adminSetProprietor rejects never-seen targets, resolvers null-safe.

API/website consistency: BusinessApiImpl delegates balance to FirmTransactionService.getAggregateBalance (same BigDecimal path as commands); formatAmount uniformly via TreasuryApi. Explorer/REST are out of this cell's scope.
Confusing behaviour: audited command catch-blocks and message keys for misstated causes / silent failures / partial application.
not_applicable: Inventory/GUI dupe vectors (charter item 5): business has no shop GUI, trade menu, or click-event item extraction — the only inventory-adjacent surface (ChestShop sale) is consumed as a read-only Treasury event.
Next.js viewer / REST API number consistency (charter item 8): those components are outside the business scope paths; only the in-plugin BusinessApi surface was checked.

checks_run: Conservation: traced every currency-moving path (transfer, transferToFirm, transferToPlayer, adminTransfer, disband sweep). All debit+credit as paired ledger_postings in one @Transactional; balances written only by trg_postings_ai (no app-side balance UPDATE). Confirmed no mint/burn via REST.

No double-spend: verified findBalanceForUpdate uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE with ascending-account-id lock ordering; overdraft re-checked under lock via shared OverdraftPolicy. Concurrent same-account spends serialize on the row lock.

Precision: grepped all model/service/mapper for double/float — every currency field (balance, amount, buyPrice, sellPrice, totalVolume, creditLimit) is BigDecimal; SQL uses DECIMAL/SUM. avgUnitPrice uses BigDecimal.divide HALF_UP scale 4. No float currency anywhere.
Failure atomicity: transfer + disband run in a single DB transaction (ledger + firm tables co-located); no cross-process payment/delivery split.

Idempotency: verified client_dedup_key UNIQUE scoped per source account (sha256(fromAccountId:key)); replayIdempotent verifies stored-vs-request shape; withIdempotencyReplay handles the insert race on the token path (gap on admin path — finding #1). Webhook enqueue is INSERT IGNORE on UNIQUE(subscription_id,txn_id); delivery cursor is monotonic with settlement lag.

Identity: UUID-keyed throughout (owner_uuid_bin BINARY(16) via UuidTypeHandler); name lookups via economy_players with PAR-144 government/player ambiguity guard; null-guards on offline/never-seen players (findPlayerNameByUuid, joined_at/created_at).
API/website consistency: ChestShop aggregates all BigDecimal.toPlainString; window vs all-time stats internally consistent; no rounding divergence found within scope.

Confusing behaviour / silent failures: reviewed GlobalExceptionHandler mappings (405, type mismatch, malformed body all mapped); found DuplicateKeyException unmapped → 500 on the admin-transfer race (finding #1).
not_applicable: Dupe vectors (inventory/shop GUI click-event cancellation, shift-click, drag): treasury-rest-api has no inventory or Bukkit event surface — ChestShop shop data is read-only aggregate here; the GUI/click dupe surface lives in the :chestshop plugin, out of this cell's scope.

OverdraftPolicy three-way floor logic: implemented in :common (io.paradaux.common.OverdraftPolicy), outside treasury-rest-api/src/main; this cell verified only that TransferService invokes it with the correct (allowOverdraft, creditLimit, isSystem) arguments.

checks_run: Mock discipline: inspected WebhookServiceTest (in-memory StubMapper, asserts observable state not interactions), RateLimitInterceptorTest (real behaviour, capturing provider), JwtTokenVerifierTest (real crypto + real tokens, stub only for DB row) — no mock-value-echo or stubbed-subject antipatterns found

Coverage of testable surface: enumerated all 14 service classes and mapped each to its tests; identified fully-untested services (AccountService, WebhookDispatcherService, AdminApiKeyService, AdminWebhookService, AdminRateLimitService) and partially-tested ones (FirmService 2/8 methods, AuthService rotation paths)

Testcontainers-vs-H2: verified DB-backed tests use MariaDB4j (real MariaDB, env-overridable to a CI MariaDB service), not H2 — no dialect mismatch; money columns confirmed DECIMAL(19,2) matching Flyway V1

Regression locks: verified amount-boundary (TransferAmountValidationIT), pagination-overflow (TransactionPaginationValidationIT), idempotency-scoping (TransferIdempotencyScopingIT), and permission-edge (MembershipAccessIT viewer/member/authorizer/revoked) pinning tests exist; found the overdraft/credit-limit floor and transfer guard branches unpinned
Test quality: assertions are on real values (BigDecimal comparisons, status/error codes, posting sums); no order-dependent tests; grep confirmed zero Thread.sleep in src/test

Framework seams: services take injected mappers/domain types and instantiate in plain unit tests (WebhookServiceTest, RateLimitInterceptorTest, JwtTokenVerifierTest do so with no Spring); no hidden Bukkit statics (this is a Spring Boot module); a startup context test exists (TreasuryRestApiApplicationTests.contextLoads + AdminFirmDocsHiddenIT)
Money-type check: confirmed no double/float used for currency in the transfer/chestshop paths (BigDecimal throughout)
not_applicable: HiberniaModule/registerAll startup-conflict test and ParameterResolver resolve/suggestion tests: this component is Spring Boot (Spring DI, @RestController/@Service), not a Hibernia-framework Guice plugin — it has no HiberniaModule, @Command handlers, or custom ParameterResolvers; the Spring equivalent (contextLoads) is present
messages.properties key cross-check: no Message-based i18n / messages.properties in this Spring component — errors are ApiException(code,message) literals, not framework message keys

checks_run: Placement: business logic in commands/listeners vs services (all commands + listeners scanned for mapper/ServiceImpl injection; listeners inspected for service-invoked business methods)
Placement: persistence-in-service and Bukkit leaks into model/service layers (model layer Bukkit imports assessed — acceptable as Bukkit-domain event carriers for a Bukkit plugin)
Placement: utility dumping grounds (NumberUtil, MaterialUtil, StringUtil, PriceUtil, BusinessAccountUtil, encoding/Base64, encoding/Base62 read)
DRY: duplicated location-placeholder building; re-implemented stdlib (Base64 vs java.util.Base64); dead vendored predicates
Naming consistency: balance/funds/money glossary (grep of getBalance/hasFunds/etc — consistent: hasFunds + getBalance used uniformly)
Currency type safety: double/float for money (config tax percentages are double = rates not money; FoundShop Double getters traced to sort-comparator/display-only, BigDecimal remains source of truth)
Null/type safety: @SuppressWarnings (none found), raw generics (none), unchecked casts (none), mutable static fields (found StringUtil/Base62), no-op API method (canHold)

OOP discipline: god classes (dep + line counts verified for TransactionServiceImpl=17 deps/719 lines, ShopServiceImpl=11 deps/626 lines, EconomyServiceImpl), public mutable fields (none), service-locator/static-state (NexoIntegration static holder judged acceptable given documented class-loading-isolation for a soft dependency)

checks_run: Command handlers: @Route bodies limited to normalisation/validation/service-call (read all 11 command classes)
Framework-bypass: hand-rolled CommandExecutor/onCommand/setExecutor, manual sub-command routing, manual arg parsing (args[i]/Integer.parseInt), manual hasPermission where @Permission belongs

Error/messaging flow: semantic exceptions vs caught/hand-formatted errors; Message keys vs hardcoded strings/legacy §/ChatColor/raw sendMessage in handlers and services (grepped all commands/services/listeners/dialogs)
Injection safety: Message.rich(...) wrapping player-influenced input (grep: none found)
Resolvers: off-thread suffix, no live Bukkit state / blocking calls (no ParameterResolvers defined in component)
Events: DI/ListenerManager registration vs manual registerEvents; early-return guard ordering; ignoreCancelled; deliberate EventPriority; MONITOR handlers mutating state

Hot events: PlayerMoveEvent/BlockPhysicsEvent/EntityMoveEvent/ChunkLoadEvent/InventoryMoveItemEvent/VehicleMoveEvent listeners and O(1)/allocation-free guards (read PhysicsBreak, ItemMove, PaperBlockDestroy, StockCounter, Preview)
Dialogs: @Screen build-only, @Action validate+delegate, flow.await for long work, DialogFlow navigation, Message-key labels (read FindDialog)
Async: no Bukkit API from async contexts; no JDBC/HTTP/file I/O on main thread without hop (traced find()/PreviewListener/PlayerConnectListener/MarketResync async boundaries)
Services: interface+impl split; services are sole mapper callers; re-validate/authorise; domain vs Bukkit types
Mappers/pooling: persistence via mappers, pool config, try-with-resources, config-component DB settings (SQLite/MyBatis PooledDataSource -- documented per-plugin deviation from HikariCP/MariaDB)
DI discipline: constructor injection; field injection; injector.getInstance service-locator use; module bindings
Money type: BigDecimal vs double/float for currency (verified EconomyServiceImpl, TransactionServiceImpl, MarketServiceImpl all use BigDecimal / long minor units)
not_applicable: ParameterResolver charter checks: no ParameterResolver implementations exist in chestshop scope (CustomItemResolver is an item-code service SPI, not a framework ParameterResolver)

HikariCP pool-config specifics: this component uses per-plugin SQLite via MyBatis PooledDataSource (documented deviation), so HikariCP maximumPoolSize/maxLifetime/leakDetectionThreshold checks do not apply; pool is intentionally single-connection for SQLite single-writer
@Async route body Bukkit-call tracing: no @Async command routes present; async work is via runTaskAsynchronously/CompletableFuture which were traced instead

checks_run: Conservation: traced every money path (shop BUY/SELL settle, sales tax leg, admin faucet/sink routing, shop creation fee, shop removal refund, server-economy mirror legs) from listener entry through EconomyServiceImpl.settle/deposit/withdraw to TreasuryApi.transfer

Double-spend: confirmed all trade entry points (PlayerInteractListener) run on the single Bukkit main thread; funds/stock checks are advisory and the atomic guard is the Treasury transfer's DB-level floor, which also protects against cross-JVM (rest-api/business) concurrency

Precision: verified prices and settlement amounts are BigDecimal end-to-end (PriceUtil, PartialFillCalculator, Transaction, EconomyServiceImpl); config taxAmount/serverTaxAmount doubles are rate percentages (converted via BigDecimal.valueOf, /100, scale 6) not currency; FoundShop.doubleValue() is display/sort-only

Failure atomicity: verified goods leg moves first with snapshot/restore (GoodsTransfer) and money settles after, with goods reversed on settle failure (execute); found non-atomic mirror-transfer ordering in shop refund/creation-fee paths
Dupe vectors: reviewed GoodsTransfer snapshot/restore, InventoryServiceImpl transfer/add/remove, PlayerInteractListener click cancellation
Idempotency: verified settle uses deterministic per-trade dedup keys (Idempotency.sha256 on tradeId) for transfer + tax legs; deposit/withdraw use nanoTime keys but are one-shot admin ops
Identity: verified UUID-keyed accounts, business synthetic-UUID codec (BusinessAccountUtil), offline-owner null guards in messaging
API/website consistency: economy.format delegates to Treasury formatAmount; not fully cross-traced into economy-explorer (out of scope)
not_applicable: Scheduled payouts / vote rewards: chestshop has no scheduled or vote-reward payout code — trades are synchronous player-interaction driven
Next.js viewer / REST API divergence: those components are out of the chestshop scope path; only noted that plugin formatting routes through TreasuryApi.formatAmount

checks_run: Mock discipline: scanned all 20 service-impl tests for interaction-only assertions, tautological mocking (mock returns exactly the asserted value), and self-stubbing spies — none found; boundary collaborators (TreasuryApi, marketApi, message, scheduler) are correctly mocked while real values (accountIds, amounts, memos, tax, upsert counts, coordinates) are asserted; EconomyServiceImplTest and MarketResyncServiceImplTest verified would fail if settle/resync logic were deleted
Coverage of testable surface: enumerated all 20 service impls (each has a test), 15 utils (each has a test), 2 mappers + 2 typehandlers (UNTESTED — finding 3), model classes (all tested)
Mapper DB testing: confirmed mappers use SQLite (users.db/items.db), not MariaDB; no Testcontainers, no H2, no in-process SQLite test — mappers exercised only via hand-written Fake mappers
Regression locks: PartialFillCalculatorTest (40 tests) covers round-to-zero, stack overflow, partial-fill boundaries; EconomyServiceImplTest covers direct/business/system settle paths and tax edges
Test quality: assertions on real values (isNotNull always followed by value asserts); no @Order/TestMethodOrder order-dependence; one Thread.sleep timing test (finding 1)

Framework seams: services use Bukkit statics resolved via MockBukkit (26 tests extend ServerTest) so all are instantiable in tests; no custom ParameterResolvers exist (NexoIntegration implements CustomItemResolver, not a hibernia ParameterResolver)
Startup wiring: confirmed NO test builds ChestShopModule/injector or calls registerAll() (finding 2)

not_applicable: H2-vs-production-dialect mismatch: not applicable — chestshop persists to SQLite (local files), not the shared MariaDB, and no H2 is used in tests

double/float currency check: not applicable to testing dimension; EconomyServiceImpl uses BigDecimal (TreasuryApi contract) and PartialFillCalculator uses BigDecimal — no float currency in the tested surface

checks_run: Conservation: traced all money-move server actions (admin-accounts transfer, admin-firms disband/rename/details, admin rate-limit/api-key, webhooks) — every one delegates to treasury-rest-api with amount as a string; no direct ledger writes, no mint/burn in the viewer
No double-spend: viewer never writes balances; all account_balances_mat reads are read-only, no read-modify-write on balances

Precision: verified lib/db.ts keeps DECIMAL/BIGINT as strings (decimalNumbers:false, bigNumberStrings:false, supportBigNumbers) and every money aggregate is SUMmed in SQL returning strings; found display-only float summation of money in KPIs (reported)
Failure atomicity: purchase/sale delivery is not implemented in the viewer (read-only market pages); group-capability replacement uses a single explorer DB transaction (lib/services/group.ts)
Dupe vectors: N/A — no inventory/GUI/click-event handling in a Next.js read-only viewer
Idempotency: link-code insert is DB-unique with bounded (5x) retry; no scheduled payouts/vote-reward code in scope; cache is cross-pod single-flight SWR over read-only aggregates
Identity: all player/firm/account lookups key on BINARY(16) UUID via uuidToBin; LEFT JOIN economy_players yields null names for never-joined/renamed players without NPE
API/website consistency: money-move amounts pass through as strings; DECIMAL SUMs are exact in SQL; display KPI rollups float-sum money (reported)
not_applicable: Dupe vectors (inventory/shop-GUI click paths) — the viewer has no inventory or click-event handling; ChestShop money movement lives in the chestshop plugin, out of this cell's scope

Failure atomicity between payment and goods delivery — no purchase/delivery execution path exists in the read-only viewer; the sole write actions delegate to treasury-rest-api which owns the transaction boundary

Audited each migration for destructive-without-guard / would-fail-on-nonempty-table operations (V4/V18/V19 DROPs, V8 ADD UNIQUE, V16 backfill+FK, V20 orphan-cleanup+FK, V23 token purge, V27 SYSTEM normalize)

Charset/collation: every table is utf8mb4 / utf8mb4_unicode_ci InnoDB

FK / ON DELETE discipline: verified financial tables (ledger_postings->accounts RESTRICT, government_fines RESTRICT, firm_accounts RESTRICT) survive account deletion; CASCADE only on non-financial child/access rows; chestshop analytics FKs are SET NULL by design

Transaction-history append-only: enumerated every UPDATE target across all scoped mappers — no UPDATE of ledger_postings/ledger_txns/account_balances_mat exists; balances written solely by trg_postings_ai; TransferService confirmed trigger-driven
Index coverage: extracted WHERE/JOIN/ORDER BY from ledger, account, chestshop-shop/sale, firm, membership, webhook mappers and mapped each to existing indexes
